faq.a1: Our frames are crafted from premium FSC-certified solid oak and walnut wood. All cushion padding is made of high-resilience foam wrapped in natural linen or textured boucle covers.
faq.a2: Standard shipping takes 5-10 business days. For larger furniture, we offer complimentary white-glove home delivery which includes room placement, assembly, and cleanup.
faq.a3: Yes, we provide a 10-year warranty on all furniture structural frames and a 2-year warranty on textile coverings and mechanical parts.
faq.q1: What materials do you use in your furniture?
faq.q2: How long does shipping and delivery take?
faq.q3: Do you offer structural warranty coverages?

material_explorer.onboarding_notice: Add material swatches in the section editor to populate this grid.

onboarding.blog_text_1: Discover the principles of clean living, raw textures, and natural lighting. How to select pieces that breathe life into your living room setup.
onboarding.blog_text_2: Why solid kiln-dried oak wood frames last for decades. Inside our craftsmanship, joinery details, and organic finishing standard guidelines.
onboarding.blog_text_3: From architectural pleated floor lamps to modern ceiling pendants. Learn how to place accent lights to create warm, cozy shadows in corners.
onboarding.blog_title_2: The Art of Slow Crafted Furniture
onboarding.blog_title_3: How to style with Ambient Lighting

room_configurator.success: You're on the list! We'll email you the moment it's ready.

sustainability.onboarding_notice: Add certification badges in the section editor. Only include claims your team can verify.

testimonials.text_1: The boucle sofa is the perfect centerpiece for my living room. High quality, extremely comfortable, and the delivery team was amazing.
testimonials.text_2: Stunning minimalist design. The solid oak dining table feels extremely premium and sturdy. It is worth every single dollar.
testimonials.text_3: Beautiful architectural desk lamp. The warm tone of the light creates such a cozy atmosphere. I will definitely shop here again.

trade_program.success: Thanks for applying! Our trade team will reach out within 2 business days.

why_choose_us.text_1: Crafted from sustainable solid wood and heavy-weight linen textiles built to endure generations.
why_choose_us.text_2: Complementary delivery, inside placement, assembly, and packaging removal on all major orders.
why_choose_us.text_3: We stand firmly behind our products. Every piece includes structural coverage for a full decade.
